story.lead: I view code not just as a set of instructions, but as a digital architecture that requires structural integrity. My journey began at the intersection of educational technology and modern web engineering, where I discovered the power of precise interfaces.
paragraphs: I'm a bachelor of Educational Technology and a Front-End Engineer enthusiast. Through the Immersive IT Bootcamp at Alterra Academy, I deepened my craft across JavaScript, UI/UX, Git, React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs, and deployment with Vercel.

I specialize in resilient, accessible, and performant systems—stripping away the unnecessary to reveal the essential. I thrive between design and development, translating clean aesthetics into fluid interactive experiences. Build for longevity. Code for precision. Design for humans.

experience.title: Front-End Engineer
experience.description: Building high-performance web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Focused on lighthouse scores above 90%, responsive design, and production-ready interfaces.
